content.full_text:
OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY
KENNETH L. NELSON

September 27, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

SUBJECT: CONFLICT OF INTEREST

George Nakano is both a City Council Member and a member of the Redevelopment Agency of the City of Torrance, as are all the Council Members. He owned a limited partnership interest in Taira Investment Company, which was a source of more than $250 per year in income. Taira bought land from Gascon Mar Company, which is the chief land owner under the terms and conditions of the DDA for the Industrial Project Area for the purpose of building a hotel and related uses. At that time (last January) Mr. Nakano transferred his interest in Taira to investments outside the City of Torrance, so as to divest himself of the interest in the Redevelopment Project area and the hotel which will be built.

Now, Gascon Mar has proposed a development within the Downtown Redevelopment Project (a different project area).

Mr. Nakano seeks advice whether he can participate as a member of the Redevelopment Agency in considering the merits of Gascon Mar's development in Downtown.

Very truly yours,

William G. Quale
Assistant City Attorney
